edgeCases: Unmapped package matches no layer glob -> Warn (not a violation); edges touching unmapped pkgs ignored
Malformed config (empty name/no paths/unknown allow/blank module) -> Fail with 'import_graph config:' prefix and no '->' arrow, distinct from a violation
Unloadable module (broken go.mod) -> go list exits non-zero -> Fail with load diagnostic, never a false Pass
_test.go TestImports/XTestImports fold into the package-under-test layer so test files cannot smuggle a forbidden cross-layer edge
Intra-layer and self imports always allowed; duplicate layer entries union by name
Stdlib and third-party imports stripped; module-prefix matched on segment boundary so substring paths are not misclassified
Empty matrix (enabled, zero layers) -> Warn not silent Pass; disabled/absent block omits the gate
Diff filter ignored: whole-module load so a violation outside the diff set is still reported
